subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy recent letter was received. By coincidence, a few days ago I had written thee a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان تحریر اخیر وصول یافت از قضا چند روز پیش نامه ای بشما مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @newspapers and the media; publications, @unity; oneness of humanity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause
